deviceSetup.title: Set up this kiosk
deviceSetup.desc: Sign in with this outlet's account to link the iPad. Staff only — this is for authentication and shows no dashboard data.
deviceSetup.wrongPartner: This iPad is set up for {{partner}}, not “{{slug}}”. Sign in with an outlet account for this partner to switch.
deviceSetup.accountMismatch: That account belongs to {{partner}}, not this kiosk (“{{slug}}”).
deviceSetup.signInError: Couldn't sign in. Check the connection and try again.

welcome.helper: Height & weight help tailor your analysis.
welcome.consent: I agree to be recorded and to Movaia creating an account to deliver my analysis, per the <bold>terms & privacy policy</bold>.
welcome.footer: By continuing you agree to Movaia's <terms>terms of service</terms> & <privacy>privacy policy</privacy>. Your data is never shared with other customers.

errors.emailRequired: Please enter your email so we can send your report.
errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.consent: Please agree to the consent to continue.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again or ask a team member.

analysis.title: AI Analysis
analysis.body: Get AI-powered insights to improve your performance and lower injury risk.

insights.title: Personalized Insights
insights.body: Tailored recommendations for your running style.

returning.title: Hi again, {{name}}!
returning.desc: We found your account — <bold>{{email}}</bold>. Ready for another run analysis?

getSet.title: {{count}} seconds until we start recording
getSet.body: Build up to your natural running pace before we start.

oneBeep.title: One beep = recording starts
oneBeep.body: Just keep running, we record for about {{count}} seconds.

twoBeeps.title: Two beeps = recording ends
twoBeeps.body: You're done, slow down and review.

camera.prerollHint: You'll hear a beep when recording starts

review.title: Happy with your clip?
review.subtitle: Give it a quick watch. You can re-record if you'd like.
review.noPreview: No preview available on this device
review.noPreviewSub: Your clip will still be submitted for analysis.

uploading.title: Uploading your run…
uploading.subtitle: Hang tight — this only takes a moment. Please don't close this screen.

confirmation.title: You're all set!
confirmation.desc: We'll email your analysis to <bold>{{email}}</bold> as soon as it's ready.
confirmation.resetIn_one: Returning to start in {{count}}s · this device won't keep your details
confirmation.resetIn_other: Returning to start in {{count}}s · this device won't keep your details

cameraDenied.title: Camera access is needed
cameraDenied.desc: To record your run we need permission to use this iPad's camera. Enable it in <bold>Settings → {{partner}} → Camera</bold>, then try again.

uploadFailed.title: Upload didn't go through
uploadFailed.desc: We couldn't reach the network — check the connection and tap retry. You won't need to record again.
uploadFailed.help: Still stuck? Ask a {{partner}} team member for help.
